title: In-app changelog drawer
description: Stay up to date with product improvements! A new changelog drawer is accessible right from the top navigation bar.

title: Back-to-top button
description: A "Back to top" button now appears after scrolling 800 px on any long page, letting you return to the page heading in one click.

title: Keyboard shortcuts reference
description: Press Shift+? from anywhere in the app to open a full list of keyboard shortcuts.

title: Transaction status filter
description: Filter your transaction history by status — pending, confirmed, or failed — directly on the Transactions page.

title: Trust gauge visualization
description: Your trust score is now displayed as an animated gauge with tier markers, making it easy to see how close you are to the next tier.

title: Dark mode
description: Toggle between light and dark themes from the header. Your preference is saved across sessions.
